title.actual: AE Standard Fit Johnny Collar Knit Polo Shirt
title.expected: AE Standard Fit Johnny Collar Knit Polo Shirt

availability.api_source_detail: Variants: LOWSTOCK, LOWSTOCK, AVAILABLE → correctly returns In Stock

original_price.notes: Product is not on sale (sale=NOSALE). Empty string is correct behavior.

remarks.actual: Color: chalk | Brand: AE | Category: AE > Men > Tops > T shirts > Short sleeve t shirts > ...
remarks.notes: Contains useful enrichment data (Color, Brand, Category hierarchy). Category string is very long but informative.

edge_case_results.notes: Only 1 sample URL available. The availability logic correctly handles mixed variant states (LOWSTOCK + AVAILABLE → In Stock). Sale price logic uses NOSALE/saleMin/listMin correctly based on API response.

script_checks.notes: Scraper uses /api/product/s/{code} endpoint (not /api/v2) which does NOT require session auth — this is a clever bypass of the auth requirement noted in site_analysis. The scraper ran in 2.93 seconds for 1 product with 1s delay.

key_fields_confirmed.name: AE Standard Fit Johnny Collar Knit Polo Shirt
key_fields_confirmed.brand.name: AE

feedback_for_writer.summary: Scraper passes all validation checks. Clean implementation using Localised Product REST API. All 11 standard fields are correct for the tested product.
code_suggestions: Consider limiting the category string in remarks to avoid extremely long values (e.g., truncate to first 3-4 segments)
The src_url is set to the same value as url since input_urls.json contains product URLs directly. If listing URLs are used in future, src_url should correctly reflect the listing page.
